modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble saving a OneNote notebook.

full_description_text:  
So, I was trying to save my OneNote notebook, right? But like, I couldn't figure out how to do it at all. I clicked around and nothing happened, and it was super frustrating! I just want to keep my notes safe, but it feels like I'm missing something obvious here.
description: So, I was trying to save my OneNote notebook, right? But like, I couldn't figure out how to do it at all. I clicked around and nothing happened, and it was super frustrating! I just want to keep my notes safe, but it feels like I'm missing something obvious here.
